Title: n8n: Authenticated XSS and Open Redirect via Form Node
Description: An authenticated user with permission to create or modify workflows could configure a Form Node with an unsanitized HTML description field or exploit an overly permissive iframe sandbox policy to perform stored cross-site scripting or redirect end users visiting the form to an arbitrary external URL. The vulnerability could be used to facilitate phishing attacks.
AffectedVersions: All versions before 1.123.24, all versions starting from 2.0.0-rc.0 before 2.10.4, all versions starting from 2.11.0 before 2.12.0
NotImpacted: All versions starting from 1.123.24 before 2.0.0-rc.0, all versions starting from 2.10.4 before 2.11.0, all versions starting from 2.12.0
